commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=0b525136dcbbaa607dc7610b83858315c5010fda)
commands.review_summary:
The PR emits embedded-agent timeout and incomplete-turn terminal errors as assistant stream events, adds regression assertions, and adds a sanitized Xinflo OpenAI-compatible stream fixture.

PR surface: Source +126, Tests +99. Total +225 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was run in this read-only review. Source inspection does show current main returning terminal error payloads without assistant stream events, while the PR covers mocked timeout and incomplete-turn paths.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor action is needed for the broken test and real behavior proof; automation should not take over because it cannot supply the contributor's external PR proof.

target.title: fix(agents): surface terminal stream errors
target.body:
Summary
- Emit terminal timeout and incomplete-turn errors as assistant stream events so live chat surfaces silent terminal failures.
- Keep terminal error events as replacement snapshots instead of append deltas to avoid concatenating stale partial output.
- Add an Xinflo OpenAI-compatible stream fixture for successful chat-completions transport coverage.

Verification
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/openai-transport-stream.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.timeout-triggered-compaction.test.ts
- .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode commit --commit HEAD

Behavior addressed: terminal agent failures that previously returned an error payload without emitting assistant live text now show visible assistant error text.
Real environment tested: local macOS checkout in /tmp/openclaw-pr-agent with Node/Vitest wrapper.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/openai-transport-stream.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.timeout-triggered-compaction.test.ts
Evidence after fix: tests assert terminal errors emit through both local run callbacks and the global agent event bus without a delta append field.
Observed result after fix: targeted Vitest command passed and autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.
What was not tested: live provider execution against Xinflo credentials was not run.
target.author: darclindy

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
